_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in provisioning and configuring cloud platform data services, including compute resources, managed databases, object storage, and analytics services, with attention to cost optimization and security configuration.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-005 (TF, cosine: 0.586), AI-K-015 (AI, cosine: 0.571).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.583). Shared vocabulary: [cloud]. DCWF-only terms [develop, implements, strategies] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytics, attention, compute, configuration, configuring, cost] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.888, R=0.839). P exceeds R by 0.049 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Develop and implements cloud strategies." and "Skill in provisioning and configuring cloud platform data services, including co" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.594 ≈ STS 0.583 (gap 0.011). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [cloud] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.4%. Shared tokens: [cloud]. DCWF-only: [develop, implements, strategies]. WIDAI-only: [analytics, attention, compute, configuration, configuring, cost].
